title: Centralize operational technical memory in a single SQLite database
context: Multiple localized memory/*.json directories across projects caused fragmented learning, manual export overhead, and duplicated trace histories.
content: Formally transition Quorum framework to store decisions, patterns, and lessons in a centralized multi-project SQLite database. This deprecates the local memory/*.json directories, simplifying agent retrieval, preventing model collapse, and facilitating seamless exports to external semantic stores like HSME or vector databases.
